channel.title: Xos Trucks News
channel.description: Latest news and press releases from Xos Trucks

item.title: Xos Launches the 2.5MWh Power Hub, Delivering Grid-Independent Energy Storage to Data Centers in Days, Not Years
item.description: Xos announces the launch of its 2.5MWh Power Hub series, a family of fully integrated, behind-the-meter energy storage and hybrid power systems engineered to deliver megawatt-scale, grid-independent power to AI data centers, industrial build-outs, and mission-critical facilities in days, not years. Scaling from 1.2 MWh to 4 MWh, the Power Hub is built on the same architecture behind more than 250 MWh of Xos energy storage already operating in commercial service across North America.

item.title: Xos Reports Record Gross Margin and Lowest Operating Loss in Company History Since Going Public, Anchored by Multi-Product Business Lines
item.description: Xos reports Q1 2026 financial results, achieving record gross margin and the lowest operating loss in company history since going public, anchored by its multi-product business lines.

item.title: Xos Brings Mobile EV Charging to the U.S. Air Force, Expanding Electric Fleet Technology Into Defense
item.description: Xos announces participation in the 2026 Air Force Global Strike Command Commercial Capabilities Showcase, demonstrating its Charger Hub for senior AFGSC leadership and defense decision-makers in Bossier City, LA.

item.title: Xos to Showcase the Complete Commercial Electrification Ecosystem at ACT Expo 2026, From Vehicles to Mobile Energy Storage
item.description: Xos announces its participation in ACT Expo 2026, showcasing its complete commercial electrification ecosystem at Booth 3216 in Las Vegas, including the Xos Hub, Stepvan, Class 6 chassis, Class 8 trucks, and Powered by Xos powertrain solutions.

item.title: Xos, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
item.description: Xos Inc. announces it will release its first quarter 2026 operating results on May 14, 2026, with a conference call and webcast at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Daylight Time.

item.title: Xos Steps Into the Defense Arena with Its Mobile Charging Solutions at TEVCON 2026
item.description: Xos makes its defense debut at TEVCON 2026, showcasing mobile charging solutions and joining military commanders on the Operational Energy panel.

item.title: Xos Brings Its Mobile Energy Solutions to Facilities Professionals at the Southern California Facilities Expo
item.description: Xos exhibits at the Southern California Facilities Expo (April 8-9, Anaheim), showcasing mobile, grid-independent EV charging that deploys in days with no utility upgrades required.

item.title: Xos Delivers Third Consecutive Quarter of Positive Operating and Free Cash Flow, Accelerates Platform Expansion Across Vehicles, Powertrains, and Energy Storage
item.description: Xos reports Q4 and full year 2025 financial results, delivering its third consecutive quarter of positive operating and free cash flow, with EBITDA loss cut by more than half and first production powertrains delivered for Blue Bird school buses.

item.title: Xos, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Fiscal Year 2025 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
item.description: Xos Inc. announces the date and details for its Fourth Quarter and Full Fiscal Year 2025 earnings release and investor conference call.

item.title: Xos Announces Production Rollout of Vehicle-to-Grid Capability Across Its Full Commercial Electric Vehicle and Energy Solutions Portfolio
item.description: Xos announces V2G production beginning April 2026 on a major electric school bus platform, with a roadmap to extend bidirectional charging capability across its full commercial vehicle and energy solutions portfolio.

item.title: Xos Launches 2026 Electric Class 6 Chassis, Starting at Just $99,000
item.description: Xos launches its 2026 Electric Class 6 Chassis at an accessible starting price of $99,000, making electric commercial vehicles more affordable for fleets.

item.title: Xos Expands Hub Lineup with Three Capacity Options, Making Mobile Charging Accessible to All Fleets
item.description: Xos expands its Hub mobile charging lineup with three new capacity options, broadening access to flexible charging solutions for electric fleets of all sizes.

item.title: Xos Extends Profitability Streak with Strong Q3 2025 Performance and Positive Operating Cash Flow
item.description: Xos reports strong Q3 2025 results, extending its profitability streak with positive operating cash flow and continued business momentum.

item.title: Xos Inc. Announces Third Quarter 2025 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
item.description: Xos Inc. announces the date and details for its Third Quarter 2025 earnings release and investor conference call.

item.title: HVIP Is Back: Here's What California Fleets Need to Know — And Why It Matters Now
item.description: California's HVIP incentive program is back, and Xos breaks down what fleet operators need to know to take advantage of available funding for electric vehicles.

item.title: Windrose and Xos Partner to Deliver Game-Changing Charging Access for Class 8 Electric Fleets
item.description: Windrose and Xos announce a strategic partnership to deliver expanded charging infrastructure access for Class 8 electric fleet operators.

item.title: Xos Inc. Appoints Automotive Veteran John Smith to its Board of Directors
item.description: Xos Inc. strengthens its leadership by appointing automotive industry veteran John Smith to its Board of Directors.

item.title: Xos Breaks the $100K Barrier for High-Powered Mobile Charging with New Hub Approved for $110,000 CORE Incentive
item.description: Xos announces its new Hub has been approved for a $110,000 CORE incentive, breaking the $100K barrier and making high-powered mobile charging more financially accessible.

item.title: Xos Hits New Milestones in Q2 2025 with Highest Revenue and Deliveries in the Company's History
item.description: Xos reports record-breaking Q2 2025 results, achieving the highest revenue and vehicle deliveries in the company's history.

item.title: Xos Inc. Announces Second Quarter 2025 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
item.description: Xos Inc. announces the date and details for its Second Quarter 2025 earnings release and investor conference call.

item.title: Xos Delivers First Quarter Results Highlighting GAAP Margin Gains
item.description: Xos reports its Q1 2025 financial results, highlighting meaningful GAAP margin gains and continued operational progress.

item.title: Xos Inc. Announces First Quarter 2025 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
item.description: Xos Inc. announces the date and details for its First Quarter 2025 earnings release and investor conference call.

item.title: Xos Inc. Reports Record-Breaking 2024 with Growing Unit Deliveries and Highest Ever Gross Profit
item.description: Xos reports a record-breaking 2024 fiscal year with growing unit deliveries and the highest gross profit in the company's history.

item.title: Xos Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter 2024 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
item.description: Xos Inc. announces the date and details for its Fourth Quarter 2024 earnings release and investor conference call.

item.title: Xos Inc. Announces Major Milestone: Xos Hub Listed on Federal GSA Schedule
item.description: Xos announces a significant milestone as the Xos Hub is officially listed on the Federal GSA Schedule, opening doors to government procurement opportunities.

item.title: Xos Inc. Powers Crown Linen Service Inc.'s Energy Init
